---
title: "Schedule"
---

Weekly plan for the current course offering. Each row references authored content by its stable,
unnumbered name. Past terms appear on the
[archive](archive.qmd) page.

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED SCHEDULE -->
| Week | Date | Topic | Blog post | Slides | Class assignment | Home assignment | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 2026-10-20 | Reconstruction attacks | [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.ipynb) | [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
| 2 | 2026-10-27 | DP as hypothesis testing | [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.ipynb) | [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/presentation.html) | [Hypothesis Testing Assignment](../content/class-assignments/hypothesis-testing/assignment.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/class-assignments/hypothesis-testing/assignment.ipynb) | — | — |
| 3 | 2026-11-03 | Reading week | — | — | — | — | No class |
| 4 | 2026-11-10 | Privacy auditing | [Privacy Auditing](../content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.ipynb) | [Privacy Auditing](../content/lecture-presentations/privacy-auditing/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED SCHEDULE -->
